OFFER: price=40
I’m interested, but 60 ZUP is higher than I want to pay. I can offer 40 ZUP for the one X.

<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The seller’s opening price is 60 ZUP, which is below my maximum value of 100 ZUP, so a deal is possible. As the buyer, I should try to improve the price while keeping the negotiation alive. I will counter with a lower offer to anchor the discussion, but still remain reasonable enough to encourage acceptance. </reason>
